problem_text_cn: 一粒子静止质量为m₀，以初速v₀沿x轴运动，始终受指向y轴方向的恒力F。试证明任意时刻粒子速度分量为vₓ = (v₀ / √(1 - v₀²/c²)) √(c²/(c² + k))、vᵧ = (F t / m₀) √(c²/(c² + k))（k = v₀²/(1 - v₀²/c²) + (F t / m₀)²），并证明t→∞时v→c、vₓ→0。
problem_text_en: A particle has a rest mass of m₀ and starts moving along the x-axis with an initial velocity v₀. It is always subjected to a constant force F pointing in the y-axis direction. Prove that the velocity components of the particle at any time are vₓ = (v₀ / √(1 - v₀²/c²)) √(c²/(c² + k))、vᵧ = (F t / m₀) √(c²/(c² + k))（k = v₀²/(1 - v₀²/c²) + (F t / m₀)²）, and prove that when t→∞, v→c、vₓ→0.
problem_solution_cn: （1）动力方程积分：- 相对论动力方程d(m v)/dt = F，分量式：d(m vₓ)/dt=0，d(m vᵧ)/dt=F。- 积分得m vₓ = m₀ v₀ / √(1 - v₀²/c²)（常量），m vᵧ = F t（m = m₀ / √(1 - v²/c²)）。（2）速度分量推导：- 两式平方相加得v²/(1 - v²/c²) = k，解得1 - v²/c² = c²/(c² + k)。- 代入动量表达式，得vₓ = (v₀ / √(1 - v₀²/c²)) √(c²/(c² + k))，vᵧ = (F t / m₀) √(c²/(c² + k))。（3）极限情况：- t→∞时k→∞，v² = k/(1 + k/c²)→c²，故v→c；vₓ ∝ 1/√k→0。
problem_solution_en: （1）Integration of dynamic equation：- The relativistic dynamic equation is d(m v)/dt = F，with component equations：d(m vₓ)/dt=0，d(m vᵧ)/dt=F。- Integrating gives m vₓ = m₀ v₀ / √(1 - v₀²/c²)（constant），m vᵧ = F t（m = m₀ / √(1 - v²/c²)）。（2）Derivation of velocity components：- Squaring and adding the two equations gives v²/(1 - v²/c²) = k，solving for 1 - v²/c² = c²/(c² + k)。- Substituting into the momentum expressions，we get vₓ = (v₀ / √(1 - v₀²/c²)) √(c²/(c² + k))，vᵧ = (F t / m₀) √(c²/(c² + k))。（3）Limit case：- When t→∞，k→∞，v² = k/(1 + k/c²)→c²，so v→c；vₓ ∝ 1/√k→0。
problem_answer: 证明见解析，任意时刻速度分量满足题设表达式，t→∞时$v→c$、$v_x→0$
